---
title: "Euphemia Emily Georgiana Bussell"
---

## Euphemia Emily Georgiana Bussell

**Dates:** (1843-1907)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1873-88)

### Biography

She published three volumes of fiction 1876-86 but described herself in the 1901 census as ‘Lady’s Companion’.

### Letters

- Letter from June 9th [1888]
- Letter from March 20th [1883?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
